name: Monkey.D.Luffy - P-075 (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [On Play] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.[When Attacking] If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more on your field, draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with a different border (Note: the original print had a full art border).
